meta.title: 自由意志与决定论
meta.description: Native-level philosophical discourse on free will and determinism in Chinese: idioms, classical rhetorical negation, formal comparative/causal grammar.
meta.description_ko: 원어민 수준의 자유의지·결정론 철학 담화: 성어, 고전적 반어 부정, 격식체 비교·인과 문형.

explanation.en: 「自由意志」(zìyóu yìzhì) means "free will", the capacity to choose independently.
explanation.ko: 「自由意志」(zìyóu yìzhì)는 독립적으로 선택할 수 있는 능력, 즉 '자유의지'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「自由意志」是什么意思？(What does 自由意志 mean?)

explanation.en: 「决定论」(juédìnglùn) means "determinism", the view that all events are necessarily caused by preceding factors.
explanation.ko: 「决定论」(juédìnglùn)는 모든 사건이 이전 원인에 의해 필연적으로 결정된다는 철학적 관점을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「决定论」是什么意思？(What does 决定论 mean?)
choices: 认为一切事件皆由先前原因所必然决定的哲学观点(the philosophical view that all events are necessarily determined by prior causes)

explanation.en: 「宿命」(sùmìng) means "predetermined fate", an unchangeable destiny.
explanation.ko: 「宿命」(sùmìng)는 미리 정해져 바꿀 수 없는 운명을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 「宿命」是什么意思？(What does 宿命 mean?)
choices: 完全由个人主宰的人生
预先注定、无法更改的命运(a predetermined, unchangeable fate)

explanation.en: 「身不由己」is an idiom meaning "unable to act according to one's own will due to external constraints".
explanation.ko: 「身不由己」는 외부 힘에 의해 자신의 뜻대로 행동할 수 없다는 뜻의 성어이다.

questions.prompt: 「身不由己」是什么意思？(What does 身不由己 mean?)
choices: 身体或处境受外力支配，无法按自己的意愿行事(one's body or circumstances are controlled by external forces, unable to act according to one's own will)

explanation.en: The capacity for autonomous choice is closely related to the concept of free will.
explanation.ko: 자율적 선택 능력은 자유의지 개념과 밀접하게 관련이 있다.

questions.prompt: 「自主选择的能力」通常与哪个哲学概念密切相关？(What philosophical concept is 自主选择的能力 closely related to?)

explanation.en: 「自由意志」means "free will".
explanation.ko: 「自由意志」는 '자유의지'를 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 哲学家们长期争论的一个核心问题是：人究竟拥有真正的___，还是所有的选择早已被注定？(A core question philosophers have long debated is: does humanity truly possess free will, or are all choices already predetermined?)

explanation.en: 「决定论」means "determinism".
explanation.ko: 「决定论」는 '결정론'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 严格意义上的___认为，宇宙中的每一个事件，包括人的思想与行为，都是由先前的因果链条所决定的。(Strict determinism holds that every event in the universe, including human thoughts and actions, is determined by preceding chains of causation.)

explanation.en: 「宿命」means "predetermined fate".
explanation.ko: 「宿命」는 '숙명'을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 在许多古老的文化传统中，人们常常将无法解释的悲剧归因于不可抗拒的___。(In many ancient cultural traditions, people often attribute inexplicable tragedies to an irresistible fate.)
choices: 完全由个人主宰的人生

explanation.en: 「身不由己」describes being unable to act according to one's own will.
explanation.ko: 「身不由己」는 자신의 뜻대로 행동할 수 없음을 뜻한다.

questions.prompt: 身处庞大的社会体系之中，个体有时会深感___，无法完全按照自己的意愿行事。(Situated within a vast social system, individuals sometimes feel deeply that circumstances are beyond their control, unable to act entirely according to their own will.)

explanation.en: This describes free will as a precondition for moral responsibility in Kant's philosophy.
explanation.ko: 이는 칸트 철학에서 자유의지가 도덕적 책임의 전제 조건임을 설명한다.

questions.prompt: 康德认为，道德责任的成立必须以人拥有___为前提。(Kant believed that the establishment of moral responsibility must presuppose that humans possess free will.)

explanation.en: 「揭示」means "to reveal".
explanation.ko: 「揭示」는 '드러내다'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 现代神经科学的一些研究___了自由意志这一传统概念的复杂性，引发了广泛讨论。(Some modern neuroscience research exposed the complexity of the traditional concept of free will, sparking widespread discussion.)

explanation.en: 「与其〜不如〜」means "rather than 〜, it's better to 〜".
explanation.ko: 「与其〜不如〜」는 '~하느니 차라리 ~하는 게 낫다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，___不如积极地运用自己的自由意志去创造未来。(Rather than passively submitting to so-called fate, it's better to actively use one's free will to create the future.)

explanation.en: 「即使〜也〜」means "even if 〜, still 〜".
explanation.ko: 「即使〜也〜」는 '설령 ~일지라도 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 这一决定___表面上看似完全出于个人意愿，___深层次来看，依然受到诸多外部因素的潜在影响。(Even though this decision might appear on the surface to be entirely a matter of personal will, on a deeper level, it is still potentially influenced by many external factors.)

explanation.en: 「之所以〜是因为〜」emphasizes the reason.
explanation.ko: 「之所以〜是因为〜」는 이유를 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 自由意志与决定论之争之所以延续了数百年而未有定论，___是因为它触及了人类对自身本质最根本的追问。(The reason the debate between free will and determinism has continued for centuries without resolution is precisely because it touches on humanity's most fundamental questions about its own nature.)

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」means "once 〜, then 〜".
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」는 '일단 ~하면 곧 ~하다'는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，___容易在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力。(Once a person believes everything is predetermined by fate, they easily give up proactive effort when facing challenges.)

explanation.en: 「归根结底〜还是〜」emphasizes the fundamental point.
explanation.ko: 「归根结底〜还是〜」는 근본적인 요점을 강조한다.

questions.prompt: 归根结底，自由意志与决定论的调和___在于承认人在既定条件下依然拥有相对的选择空间。(In the final analysis, the reconciliation between free will and determinism still lies in acknowledging that humans still have relative room for choice within given conditions.)

explanation.en: 「共同」means "jointly/together".
explanation.ko: 「共同」는 '함께'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 由此可见，先天条件与后天选择___塑造着一个人最终的人生轨迹。(From this we can see that both innate conditions and later choices jointly shape a person's ultimate life trajectory.)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often/frequently".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 众所周知，即使身处相同的境遇，不同的人___会做出截然不同的选择，这恰恰印证了自由意志的存在。(As everyone knows, even in the same circumstances, different people will often make completely different choices, which precisely confirms the existence of free will.)

explanation.en: 「岂〜」is a classical-style rhetorical negation meaning "how could it be that 〜", used to strongly deny a claim.
explanation.ko: 「岂〜」는 고전적 반어 표현으로 '어찌 ~이겠는가'라는 뜻으로 강한 부정을 나타낸다.

questions.prompt: 人生之路___全然由命运铺就，个人的抉择与努力又岂能被轻易忽略？(Life's path is by no means entirely paved by fate — how could personal choices and efforts be easily disregarded?)

explanation.en: 「往往」means "often".
explanation.ko: 「往往」는 '흔히'라는 뜻이다.

questions.prompt: 即使在极端受限的处境下，人依然___保留着某种内在的选择自由，这正是自由意志顽强的体现。(Even in extremely constrained circumstances, people still retain some form of inner freedom of choice, which is precisely a resilient manifestation of free will.)

explanation.en: 「不如」must come before the verb phrase 积极地运用〜: 不如积极地运用 (not 积极不如地运用).
explanation.ko: 「不如」는 동사구 '积极地运用〜' 앞에 와야 하므로 '不如积极地运用'이 맞다.

questions.prompt: 与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，积极不如地运用自己的自由意志去创造未来。(Rather than passively submitting to so-called fate, it's better to actively use one's free will to create the future.) — find the error
choices: 与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，不如积极地运用自己的自由意志去创造未来。
与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，积极不如地运用自己的自由意志去创造未来。
与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，不如运用积极地自己的自由意志去创造未来。
与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，积极地不如运用自己的自由意志去创造未来。

explanation.en: The fixed pattern requires 是因为 in that order, not 因为是.
explanation.ko: 고정 문형은 '因为是'가 아니라 '是因为' 순서여야 한다.

questions.prompt: 自由意志与决定论之争之所以延续了数百年而未有定论，因为是它触及了人类对自身本质最根本的追问。(The reason the debate between free will and determinism has continued for centuries without resolution is precisely because it touches on humanity's most fundamental questions about its own nature.) — find the error
choices: 自由意志与决定论之争之所以延续了数百年而未有定论，是因为它触及了人类对自身本质最根本的追问。
自由意志与决定论之争之所以延续了数百年而未有定论，因为是它触及了人类对自身本质最根本的追问。
自由意志与决定论之争之所以延续了数百年而未有定论，是它因为触及了人类对自身本质最根本的追问。
自由意志与决定论之争之所以延续了数百年而未有定论，它是因为触及了人类对自身本质最根本的追问。

explanation.en: 「一旦〜就〜」is the correct fixed pattern; 「才」does not match the immediate consequence implied by 一旦.
explanation.ko: 「一旦〜就〜」가 올바른 고정 문형이며 「才」는 '一旦'의 즉각적 결과와 맞지 않는다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，容易才在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力。(Once a person believes everything is predetermined by fate, they easily give up proactive effort when facing challenges.) — find the error
choices: 一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，就容易在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力。
一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，容易才在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力。
一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，才容易在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力。
一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，容易在才面对挑战时放弃主动的努力。

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，不如积极地运用自己的自由意志去创造未来 ("Rather than passively submitting to so-called fate, it's better to actively use one's free will to create the future").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，不如积极地运用自己的自由意志去创造未来' (소위 숙명에 소극적으로 굴복하느니 차라리 적극적으로 자신의 자유의지를 발휘해 미래를 창조하는 게 낫다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 与其消极地屈从于所谓的宿命，__________运用自己的自由意志去创造未来。(Rather than passively submitting to so-called fate, it's better to actively use one's free will to create the future.)

explanation.en: The sentence reads: 一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，就容易在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力 ("Once a person believes everything is predetermined by fate, they easily give up proactive effort when facing challenges").
explanation.ko: 문장은 '一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，就容易在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力' (사람은 일단 모든 것이 운명에 의해 정해졌다고 믿으면 도전 앞에서 능동적인 노력을 쉽게 포기하게 된다)가 된다.

questions.prompt: 一个人一旦相信一切皆由命运注定，__________在面对挑战时放弃主动的努力。(Once a person believes everything is predetermined by fate, they easily give up proactive effort when facing challenges.)
